EmitParalysisSteerInput.description: Input to the unified emitParalysisSteer helper (DD-2). Carrier is decided internally from providerClass.

providerClass.description: Resolved provider class. SL (claude et al.) → ephemeral system-reminder; SS (codex/other/unknown) → persisted role:user nudge. Derived via resolvePolicy(...).kind === 'claude' (DD-3), defaulting non-claude to SS.

text.description: Steering body. For SL this is the 3rd-person not-user-feedback variant; for SS this is the existing selectParalysisNudge output (byte-identical, INV-0).

sessionMessages.description: The cloned per-turn message array. SL path pushes an ephemeral system-reminder onto its tail; never persisted.

lastUser.description: Last real user message (source of agent/variant fields for the SS persisted path).

model.description: Resolved model (providerId used for class resolution; carried into the SS persisted message).

EmitParalysisSteerOutcome.description: Observable side-effect contract (not a return value; asserted by tests).

carrier.description: SL → ephemeral_system_reminder (clone tail only); SS → persisted_user_message (Session.updateMessage+updatePart).

storeWrites.description: Number of Session store writes. MUST be 0 for SL, >=1 for SS.

recoveryCountAfter.description: Always 1 after a first-detection steer, regardless of carrier (ladder is carrier-independent, R1).
